auth.ssoProvisioningFailed: SSO sign-in failed. Your account may not be provisioned yet — contact your organization administrator or use an invite link.
auth.2faPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or use a backup code.

welcome.hero.title: Membership books built for kehilla treasurers
welcome.hero.subtitle: Stop reconciling dues by age bracket, bar mitzvah funds, and chasuna charges across spreadsheets. Run statement months on the Hebrew calendar, email each family their balance, and know your yearly P&L — without becoming a part-time accountant.
welcome.earlyAccess: Kasa is invitation-only while we're in early access.
welcome.outcomes.heading: What treasurers get back
welcome.outcomes.spreadsheet.title: Replace the treasurer's spreadsheet
welcome.outcomes.spreadsheet.body: Families, dues tiers, payments, and lifecycle events in one place — no more copying rows between workbooks or fixing broken formulas before statement month.
welcome.outcomes.statements.title: Automated statement months
welcome.outcomes.statements.body: Run your statement cycle, charge saved cards, and email PDF statements to each family. Statement month follows the Hebrew calendar, not just Gregorian.
welcome.outcomes.balance.title: Yearly balance at a glance
welcome.outcomes.balance.body: See cycle balances, per-family history, and yearly P&L without exporting to Excel. Know where the kehilla stands before the board asks.
welcome.differentiators.heading: Built the way your kehilla works
welcome.differentiators.rtl.title: Hebrew & Yiddish, RTL-ready
welcome.differentiators.rtl.body: Statements, labels, and Kevittel in Hebrew or Yiddish with right-to-left layout — not bolted-on translations.
welcome.differentiators.plans.title: Your plans and event types
welcome.differentiators.plans.body: Configure payment plans by age bracket, define lifecycle events — bar mitzvah fund, chasuna, Kevittel — and let Kasa track what each family owes.
welcome.differentiators.receipts.title: Kevittel, tax receipts, audit trail
welcome.differentiators.receipts.body: Print Kevittel for donations, generate tax receipts, and keep an auditable log of every change treasurers make.
welcome.billing.title: How billing works
welcome.billing.body: Your Kasa subscription pays for the workspace — users, families, and features for your kehilla. When you charge members' saved cards for dues or events, those payments go to your organization. Member charges are separate from your Kasa bill.
welcome.cta.title: Ready to retire the membership spreadsheet?
welcome.cta.subtitle: Tell us about your kehilla and we'll send an invitation.

pricing.hero.subtitle: Pay Kasa for the workspace your kehilla needs. Member card charges for dues, bar mitzvah funds, and events go to your organization — not to Kasa.

settings.email.configActiveBody: Your email settings are saved and will be used for statements, receipts, and communications. Sent emails are logged; opens and link clicks are tracked when enabled.

Add your Gmail address and app password below.

Add your organization's mailing address under Settings → Letterhead.

settings.security.title: Security
settings.security.description: Organization security and platform access preferences.
settings.security.ownerOnly: Only the organization owner can change this setting.
settings.security.supportNotify.title: Support access notifications
settings.security.supportNotify.descript: When a Kasa platform administrator enters support mode for your organization, the owner receives an email with the reason and access level. Disable this if you prefer not to be notified (sessions are still audit-logged).
settings.security.supportNotify.label: Email owner when platform support accesses this organization

settings.activity.description: Read-only audit of administrative actions in this organization.

settings.activity.empty.description: Adjust the filters above or clear them to see the most recent events.
settings.activity.retention.title: Retention policy
settings.activity.retention.description: Administrative actions are kept for about {days} days.
settings.activity.retention.policy: Activity entries older than {days} days are hidden from this view and CSV export. The platform maximum is {platformDays} days.
settings.activity.retention.ttlNote: MongoDB automatically purges rows after {maxDays} days regardless of org preference.
settings.activity.retention.daysHint: Between {min} and {max} days. Set to the platform default to clear a custom value.
settings.activity.retention.ownerOnly: Only the organization owner can change the retention period.
settings.security.sso.title: Single sign-on (SSO)
settings.security.sso.description: OIDC SSO is configured at the platform level via environment variables. Per-organization IdP settings are planned for a later release.

settings.security.sso.disabled: SSO is not configured on this deployment. Members sign in with email and password.
settings.apiKeys.title: API keys
settings.apiKeys.description: Read-only API keys for integrations. Keys are hashed in the database; the secret is shown only once when created. Use Authorization: Bearer <key> on GET /api/families and GET /api/payments.
settings.apiKeys.showOnceBody: This is the only time the full key will be shown. Store it securely — it cannot be recovered.
settings.apiKeys.revokeConfirmMessage: Revoke "{name}"? Integrations using this key will stop working immediately.

settings.roles.communicationsHint: Access to families and communications tools.

calculations.formula.calculatedExpensesD: Lifecycle event payments for the year plus any manual extra expense (totalExpenses + extraExpense).
calculations.formula.expectedDuesDesc: Current roster × each plan's yearly price — not a historical snapshot. Compare against payments received; do not treat as billed revenue for past years.

projections.headline.noIncome: Assign families to payment plans to see price recommendations.
projections.table.adjustmentTooltip: Raise every plan price by this percentage to cover projected events and keep the communal fund solvent. Ratios between plans stay the same.
projections.how.recommendedDuesFormula: current plan price × max(annual expense ratio, solvency scale) — solvency scale is the minimum uniform raise to keep the fund balance from going negative
projections.how.fundBalanceDesc: — cumulative cash collected minus lifecycle payouts before the start year (from yearly calculations when available).
projections.how.expectedExpensesDesc: — per event, the higher of roster dates in that year or the historical average per year (including new children), times current cost, summed.
projections.how.growthNote: growing each year by the lookback average:
projections.how.noBmNote: Your organization doesn't auto-assign a plan to bar-mitzvah-aged males, so only families count as payers. To enable that, configure "Bar Mitzvah auto-assign plan" on the organization settings.
projections.how.noEvents: No lifecycle events configured. Add some on
sms.comingSoon.title: SMS messaging
sms.comingSoon.message: SMS is not available yet. Configure email under Settings → Email to reach families today.
email.retry.unavailable: Cannot retry — the original message body was not stored for this send.
admin.supportMode.bannerViewing: viewing {orgName} ({orgSlug}) as admin. Actions are logged.
admin.supportMode.sessionSummaryDescript: {count} actions were recorded during this support session.
admin.supportMode.sessionSummaryEmpty: No additional actions were recorded beyond entering support mode.
admin.supportMode.reasonPlaceholder: Describe why you need access (ticket number, customer request, etc.)
admin.supportMode.reasonTooShort: Reason must be at least 3 characters.
admin.supportMode.scopeCommunicationsDes: Emails, templates, and automations — billing APIs are blocked.
admin.supportMode.scopeBillingDescriptio: Subscriptions and invoices — communications APIs are blocked.
admin.supportMode.modalDescription: You are about to open {orgName} as an org admin. This session is audit-logged.
admin.supportMode.viewOnlyNotice: View only — you cannot make changes in this support session.
admin.supportMode.landingSubtitle: Quick snapshot for {orgName} — use the links below to investigate.
admin.platformTotp.title: Confirm your identity
admin.platformTotp.description: Enter your authenticator code to continue with this sensitive platform admin action.
admin.platformTotp.codeRequired: Enter your 6-digit code or backup code.
admin.platformTotp.hint: Valid for 5 minutes after verification. Read-only support mode does not require this step.
admin.supportAudit.title: Support audit
admin.supportAudit.subtitle: Impersonation sessions started and ended by platform admins. All entries include the stated reason.
admin.supportAudit.accessDeniedBody: This page is only available to platform administrators listed in
admin.supportAudit.twoFactorBody: Platform admin access requires 2FA on your account. Enable it in account settings, then return to this page.
admin.supportAudit.emptyDescription: Adjust the filters above or clear them to see support session history.
admin.supportAudit.loadFailed: Failed to load support audit log.
admin.supportAudit.sessionSubtitle: Actions recorded during this impersonation session.
admin.ops.title: Platform ops
admin.ops.subtitle: Read-only health view — SMTP send failures, bounce rates, and onboarding blockers.
admin.ops.twoFactorBody: Enable 2FA in account settings to access platform admin tools.
admin.ops.smtpFailuresDescription: Organizations with failed email sends in the selected window.
admin.ops.smtpFailuresEmpty: No SMTP failures in this window
admin.ops.bounceRateDescription: Organizations with ≥10% bounce rate and at least 5 sends in the window.
admin.ops.bounceRateEmpty: No organizations above the bounce threshold
admin.ops.onboardingDescription: Workspaces that have not completed setup.
